name: calendar
description: Tool for managing Google Calendar events. Use this when the user wants to schedule, book, or create a meeting, appointment, reminder, or any event.

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Schedule a meeting, appointment, or event on the user's Google Calendar. Use this whenever the user asks to 'book', 'schedule', 'remind', 'set up', or mentions having an event/meeting at a specific time.

title.description: The title or summary of the event (e.g., 'Meeting with John', 'Doctor Appointment', 'Alibaba Meeting').

start_time.description: The start time of the event in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-02-16T08:00:00'). Infer the date from context: 'tomorrow' means the next day, 'tmr' means tomorrow, 'next Monday' means the upcoming Monday, etc.

end_time.description: The end time of the event in ISO 8601 format. If not specified by the user, assume 1 hour after start_time.

description.description: Optional description or details for the event.
